text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after the Kikuka Sho, King Halo shows
up with her head held high at a racecourse in her
signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She launches into her puzzling call-and-response
routine, drawing the attention of the surrounding
reporters—all according to plan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking advantage of this moment, she announces
her plan to run in the Takamatsunomiya Kinen
with hopes that this news will once again steer the
public gaze her way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The prideful Umamusume makes her intentions
clear—she has now chosen her own path, devoid
of any influence from her mother or anyone else.
